items.title: As a reminder, Leon Rose acquired Josh Hart in exchange for Cam Reddish (who was last seen in China) and a protected first-round pick (which turned into Kris Murray)
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt: As a reminder, Leon Rose acquired Josh Hart in exchange for Cam Reddish (who was last seen in China) and a protected first-round pick (which turned into Kris Murray)
